queries.question: What is the fee of accounts where the product is called checking and what is the interest rate of the accounts with the same product name.
queries.sql:
SELECT Fees.cardfee AS AMOUNT
FROM Accounts JOIN Fees ON Accounts.AccountID = Fees.AccountID
WHERE Accounts.Product = "Checking"
UNION
SELECT InterestRates.monthlyinterestrate
FROM Accounts JOIN InterestRates ON Accounts.AccountID = InterestRates.AccountID
WHERE Accounts.Product = "Checking"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?accounts a :Accounts .
    ?fees a :Fees .
    ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
    ?fees p:CardFee ?cardfee .
    ?accounts p:Product ?product_f .
    FILTER(STR(?product_f) = "Checking")
    BIND(?cardfee AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?accounts a :Accounts .
    ?interestrates a :InterestRates .
    ?interestrates p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
    ?interestrates p:MonthlyInterestRate ?monthlyinterestrate .
    ?accounts p:Product ?product_f .
    FILTER(STR(?product_f) = "Checking")
    BIND(?monthlyinterestrate AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Give me all fees and interest rates for the account's product called checking.
queries.sql:
SELECT Fees.cardfee AS AMOUNT
FROM Accounts JOIN Fees ON Accounts.AccountID = Fees.AccountID
UNION
SELECT InterestRates.monthlyinterestrate AS AMOUNT
FROM Accounts JOIN InterestRates ON Accounts.AccountID = InterestRates.AccountID
WHERE Accounts.Product = "Checking"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?accounts a :Accounts .
    ?fees a :Fees .
    ?fees p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
    ?fees p:CardFee ?cardfee .
    BIND(?cardfee AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?accounts a :Accounts .
    ?interestrates a :InterestRates .
    ?interestrates p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
    ?interestrates p:MonthlyInterestRate ?monthlyinterestrate .
    ?accounts p:Product ?product_f .
    FILTER(STR(?product_f) = "Checking")

  }
}
